headline: Regulators Seek Input on $1T Margin Rules

article.title: SEC, CFTC seek input on unified portfolio margin rules across securities and derivatives
article.summary: The regulatory agencies are seeking public feedback on cross-margining, collateral and risk management as cryptocurrency derivatives and multi-asset trading continue to expand.

article.title: Ethereum whale who shorted October 2025 crash opens $19.7M ETH short position
article.summary: Ether’s technical setup points to a potential drop to $1,375, a move that could lift one whale’s unrealized profit to $2.39 million.

headline: US Stocks Rise 1.2% Amid Tech Sell-Off

article.title: US Stocks Climb as Sentiment Improves Despite Tech Declines
article.summary: US stocks rebounded from earlier losses Friday on a survey showing cooler-than-expected inflation expectations and easing rate hike concerns, which helped offset weakness in chip stocks that began overnight.

headline: Cohen Warns of 20% Stock Valuation Risk

article.title: Stock Valuations Should Worry Investors, Abby Joseph Cohen Says
article.summary: Lofty stock prices may be hiding risks investors should be paying more attention to, especially in the labor market, according to Abby Joseph Cohen, the former Goldman Sachs partner and now Columbia Business School professor.

headline: Spain Rejects EU Crypto Deadline Extensions Amid Binance Lapse
